description: a scrappy orange-and-cream otter mascot wearing a tiny bowtie, holding an oversized game-show microphone
a smug purple-suited lounge-lizard host character with slicked hair and a gold medallion
a nervous beige robot intern made of blocky CRT-monitor parts, clutching a clipboard
a cheerful magenta blob-creature with a chef's hat dripping cartoon gravy, game-show sparkle eyes
a mild-mannered gray-suited accountant character secretly wearing a studded leather wristband
a mustached plumber character in a sequined jumpsuit and afro, disco-ball earring
a wide-eyed jittery raccoon-person in an oversized company polo shirt, holding too much coffee
a sleek chrome-plated robotic flamingo mascot with a single glowing pink eye
